message:
feat: add comprehensive E2E test suite for async runtime

New E2E tests:
- codec_e2e.rs - encoding/decoding verification
- io_e2e.rs - I/O operation testing
- replay_debugging.rs - replay system tests
- stream_e2e.rs - async stream tests
- time_e2e.rs - timer and scheduling tests

Core updates:
- Update phase0_verification.rs tests
- Remove obsolete windows.rs reactor (cross-platform cleanup)
- Update .bv.lock state

These tests provide comprehensive coverage for the async
runtime's deterministic replay capabilities.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
